title: 1.28x increased Basal Cell Carcinoma risk
summary: 1.28x increased Basal Cell Carcinoma risk.
detail: Increased risk of this kind of skin cancer. This is the most common kind of cancer in the United States. This kind has less danger of metastasizing, but still needs to be treated if it occurs. Note that if you have both the Basal Cell Carcinoma mutations, your combined risk would be 2.68x.
